summary: Extraction Apply Fields Fix - All tests PASSED. Backend (9/9) and Frontend verification complete. The fix for Pydantic validation error on working_time_opt_out field and Promise.allSettled for graceful degradation is working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/employees/{id} works without Pydantic validation errors
✅ GET /api/employees list works without Pydantic validation errors
✅ POST /api/extractions/{id}/apply successfully saves selected fields to profile
✅ Profile shows updated values after apply (ni_number=TK753130C, city=Chatham, postcode=ME4 5HY)
✅ Apply supports partial updates - only selected fields are updated
✅ Failed fields are reported individually, not as generic error
✅ working_time_opt_out field accepts both string and boolean values (Optional[Any])
✅ All 9 fetchData endpoints work correctly (Promise.allSettled graceful degradation)
✅ Employee profile page loads after apply without 'Failed to load employee data' error
✅ Frontend displays extracted profile data correctly (NI Number, Address, City, Postcode)
critical_code_review_comments: EmployeeResponse model correctly uses Optional[Any] for declaration fields (working_time_opt_out, dbs_update_service_consent, etc.) at line 2559
apply_extraction() has proper error handling with partial success support at line 5199
fetchData() correctly uses Promise.allSettled for graceful degradation at line 264
APPLICATION_FORM_FIELD_MAPPING correctly maps extracted fields at line 4367
Boolean field conversion handles string values like 'I wish to opt out' correctly

verified_fields.address: 148 Castle Road, Chatham, Kent, ME4 5HY, Uk

fixes_verified.issue: Pydantic validation error on working_time_opt_out field (string vs bool)
fixes_verified.fix: Changed EmployeeResponse model to use Optional[Any] for declaration fields

fixes_verified.issue: Promise.all failing entire fetchData if one request fails
fixes_verified.fix: Changed fetchData() from Promise.all to Promise.allSettled for graceful degradation

fixes_verified.issue: Apply extraction not supporting partial updates
fixes_verified.fix: apply_extraction() now validates each field individually and reports failures separately

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test employee Olakunle Alonge
context_for_next_testing_agent: Extraction and apply functionality fully working. Test employee Olakunle Alonge (d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77) has 38 fields extracted and applied from application form. Profile displays NI Number, Address, City, Postcode correctly. The working_time_opt_out field now accepts both string and boolean values via Optional[Any] type.
